framework.name: Multi-Agent Specialist Architecture
framework.description: Rather than one monolithic AI, agentic commerce uses coordinated teams of specialized agents: searchers, negotiators, payment handlers, managed by a coordinator agent that orchestrates the workflow.
framework.raw_quote: This isn't one giant all-knowing AI doing everything. It's actually more like a well-oiled team of specialists. You've got one agent that's great at searching, another that's a master negotiator... they're all coordinated by a manager
